biography: Joni, proudly representing Hill Side Golf Club, etched his name into the annals of the Hector Trophée through a singular, yet profoundly impactful, appearance in this esteemed pair competition.

In his only venture onto the tournament's greens, Joni achieved a remarkable feat: he successfully guided his pairing to claim the coveted Hector Trophée. This triumph, secured in his sole foray into the event, stands as a testament to his exceptional ability to perform under pressure within the team format. While the individual Victor Trophy did not accompany his team's success, his perfect record in the pair competition remains a distinctive highlight in the tournament's storied history.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 prepares to commence, Joni will regrettably not be among the competitors gracing the fairways, having concluded his active involvement and now considered retired from Hector events. His brief, yet decisive, tenure leaves an indelible mark, symbolizing a competitor who seized his moment with extraordinary success.
